name: @usebruno/registry-core
description: Isomorphic core for the OpenCollection registry — semver precedence, the category catalog, and entry validation/derivation — shared by the server (rebuild + API) and the app (registry-ui). One source of truth so validation and version resolution can't drift between the two halves of the hybrid model. The node-only SSRF guard is a separate subpath so it never enters a browser bundle.
